lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its life. The exterior paint retains a nice shine, though there are a few minor stone chips and light surface scratches consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is clean and comfortable, showing only slight wear on the driver's seat bolster. Mechanically, it runs smoothly and has a solid service history, making it a dependable choice for its next owner.

The vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior has no scratches, dents, or paint imperfections. The interior shows no signs of wear, and all materials are in original condition. All mechanical components are fully functional and have been maintained according to the manufacturer's schedule.

This vehicle is in poor condition and requires significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. The exterior shows substantial rust on the door panels and wheel wells, along with multiple dents and heavily peeling clear coat. Inside, the upholstery is torn, and several interior components, including the radio and AC, are currently non-functional. Mechanically, the engine runs roughly and will likely need a major overhaul soon. It is being sold as-is, ideally for parts or as a major restoration project.

Check out this dependable daily driver! This vehicle is in fair condition and is ready to hit the road with its next owner. It shows some honest signs of age and use, both inside and out, but it remains a functional and steady performer. It's a great opportunity to own a solid car that still has plenty of miles to give!

The vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior paint and body are flawless with no scratches or dents. The interior is in like-new condition with no visible wear. Mechanically, all components, including the engine and transmission, are in perfect working order.

We are proud to present this peerless automotive specimen, maintained in a state of absolute preservation. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring an unblemished exterior profile and an interior that remains in its original, factory-fresh state. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our uncompromising standards for performance and reliability. For the discerning individual seeking a definitive example of engineering excellence, this vehicle offers an unparalleled acquisition opportunity.

Hey there! If you’ve been searching for a ride that’s basically brand new, you’ve found it! This beauty has been my absolute pride and joy—it’s in flawless condition and has been pampered every single day. It’s super clean, runs like a total dream, and honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve taken such good care of it, and I’m so excited for someone else to get behind the wheel and love it as much as I have. Come take a look and see for yourself!

Offering an investment-grade E46 M3 in pristine condition. This example features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. The high-revving valvetrain is precisely shimmed, and the Vanos unit has been overhauled for optimal cam phasing. Mated to a crisp 6-speed manual Getrag gearbox, the drivetrain is free of lash. Chassis integrity is guaranteed with proactive rear subframe reinforcement and
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Clean title. Inspection report available.

Presenting an absolute showroom-quality specimen that defines the term 'mint condition.' This vehicle has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled garage and has never seen a day of inclement weather. The exterior finish retains its deep, mirror-like luster with zero swirl marks, rock chips, or door dings, further protected by a premium multi-stage ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the high-grade leather upholstery is supple and free of any bolster wear, creasing, or fading. It has strictly been a smoke-free and pet-free environment, retaining that distinct new-car aroma. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach. It comes with a comprehensive, binder-organized service history documenting every scheduled maintenance interval performed exclusively at authorized dealerships. The engine bay is detailed to a professional standard, showing no signs of fluid seepage or aging components. All onboard electronics, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver assistance features, function with factory precision. The tires are near-new with deep tread depth, and the original alloy wheels are completely free of curb rash. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line.

Presented here is an exemplary specimen of automotive engineering, maintained to the highest standards of preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, boasting a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory luster. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience that is indistinguishable from new. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly peerless asset.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in pristine, showroom condition. Every detail reflects meticulous care, from the flawless paintwork to the immaculate interior upholstery. This specimen represents the pinnacle of its class, offering uncompromising performance and an aesthetic that rivals a factory-new model. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands excellence, this vehicle stands as a definitive benchmark.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, she’s a total dream. This car is in pristine, showroom-level condition—I’ve babied it since day one and it’s always been kept tucked away in a garage. It drives like a dream and still has that wonderful new-car feel! If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the dealership hassle, you’ve found it. I'm so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have!

Exceptional E46 M3 in collector-grade condition. This S54-powered masterpiece features high-revving individual throttle bodies and a precise Getrag six-speed manual linkage. Mechanically optimized with documented VANOS bulletproofing and subframe reinforcement, the chassis remains rigid and communicative. The limited-slip differential provides surgical power delivery, while the suspension retains its factory-spec damping and kinematics. A turnkey example for the discerning purist.
One owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Flawless interior. Original paint. Full service history.

Presenting a collector-grade masterpiece that truly defines the term 'mint.' This vehicle has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, resulting in a factory-fresh appearance that must be seen to be believed. The exterior paint boasts a deep, mirror-like luster completely free of swirls, stone chips, or imperfections, while the original alloy wheels remain pristine without a hint of curb rash. Step inside to a cabin that still carries a showroom aroma; the premium leather seating is supple with no bolster wear, and every tactile surface remains matte and unworn. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a documented service history and a driving experience that is as tight and responsive as the day it was first delivered. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a virtually new example of this sought-after model.

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary specimen of automotive preservation, maintained to a concours-level standard. This vehicle exhibits an impeccable exterior finish paired with an interior that remains in showroom-original condition. Rigorously inspected and curated for the discerning collector, it offers a peerless driving experience and represents a superlative investment in quality.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen exhibits showroom-quality aesthetics and mechanical integrity, representing the pinnacle of its class. It offers a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle in truly pristine, investment-grade condition.

Hey there! Looking for your dream ride? You’ve gotta see this beauty! It’s in absolutely pristine, showroom condition—honestly looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot. I’ve taken super good care of it, so it’s sparkling clean and ready for a new home. Come grab this gem before someone else does!

Offered is an exceptional E46 M3, featuring the high-revving S54 inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and a precision-tuned VANOS system. This example boasts a reinforced rear subframe and a refreshed suspension setup with Bilstein dampers, ensuring optimal cornering kinematics. The 6-speed manual gearbox and M-Variable limited-slip differential provide an analog, driver-centric experience. Maintained to the highest standards, the vehicle features flawless paint depth and a pristine cabin with zero bolster wear. This is a collector-grade specimen with recent rod bearing and valve clearance services completed.
Mint condition. Single owner. Zero accidents. Garage kept. Full service records included. Inspection ready.

This pristine 2021 Luxury Sport Sedan is in showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior features a flawless Deep Metallic Blue finish with zero stone chips, scratches, or swirl marks, protected by a professional ceramic coating that provides a deep, mirror-like shine. Inside, the premium hand-stitched leather interior remains in a factory-fresh state, smelling like new with absolutely no creases, stains, or wear on the bolsters. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, boasting a complete service history exclusively from authorized dealerships and a whisper-quiet engine. Every electronic component, sensor, and interior feature functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to own a vehicle that is indistinguishable from a brand-new model, offering a smooth, powerful, and uncompromising driving experience.

We are honored to present this superlative vehicle, an acquisition that defines automotive excellence. Maintained with fastidious attention to detail, this specimen remains in showroom-grade condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and absolute mechanical integrity. Every facet of this motorcar—from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments—reflects a standard of preservation rarely encountered in the secondary market. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection, this vehicle offers an unrivaled opportunity to own a collector-grade example of engineering mastery.

We are pleased to present an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a level of preservation that defies its age. Every surface reflects a commitment to excellence, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments. For the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly mint-condition vehicle that has been meticulously maintained to the highest standards.

Hey there! I am so excited to show you this absolute gem. Honestly, it’s in such incredible shape that you’d think it just rolled off the showroom floor today! I have babied this car since day one, and it’s been kept in pristine condition—not a single scratch or smudge to be found. It drives like an absolute dream and still has that wonderful new-car feel. I'm looking for someone who will love it as much as I have. Come take a look, I promise you won't be disappointed!

Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Zero accidents. Full service history. Flawless mechanical state.

Presenting a truly exceptional specimen that redefines the standard for 'mint' condition. This vehicle has been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, preserving its original factory luster without a single swirl mark, stone chip, or blemish on the bodywork. The interior remains in showroom state, featuring supple, untouched leather, crisp electronics, and that unmistakable new-car scent. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach; every service has been performed ahead of schedule by certified technicians, with full documentation provided. From the pristine undercarriage to the mirror-like finish of the alloy wheels, no detail has been overlooked. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line.

We are pleased to present this exceptional specimen, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar in pristine, showroom condition. Every aspect, from the flawless exterior finish to the meticulously preserved interior, reflects a commitment to uncompromising quality. Mechanically sound and aesthetically superior, this vehicle offers an unrivaled driving experience for the discerning collector or enthusiast.
